summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V2 Command Center features. Backend APIs 100% functional (15/15 tests passed), frontend 100% functional with all requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@redribbonops.com / admin123
Dashboard loads with correct order stats (Open, In Progress, Pending Review, Delivered, SLA Breaching)
Dashboard shows recent orders with status badges
Command Center page loads with title input, request type toggle, and category selection
Category L1 dropdown shows seeded categories (Media Services, Feature Requests, Bug Reports / Incidents)
Category L2 dropdown appears after selecting L1 category
Selecting 'Editing Services' under Media Services shows editing form with priority, description, video script fields
Selecting subcategory under 'Feature Requests' shows feature request form with description, why important, who is for fields
Selecting subcategory under 'Bug Reports' shows bug report form with severity, steps to reproduce, expected/actual behavior fields
My Requests tab shows user's submitted requests with all 3 types (Editing, Feature, Bug)
Profile page loads via user dropdown menu
Profile page allows changing name and email
Profile page has password change functionality with current/new/confirm password fields
Profile page has avatar upload section
Categories page (admin only) shows L1 and L2 categories
Admin can add new L1 category with name, description, icon
Admin can add new L2 subcategory with Editor Workflow toggle
Quick link 'Request a Feature' navigates to Command Center with Feature Requests preselected
Quick link 'Report a Bug' navigates to Command Center with Bug Reports preselected and Incident/Bug type selected
Sidebar shows Command Center link, Quick Links section
User dropdown shows Profile Settings and Logout options
critical_code_review_comments: Login page missing data-testid attributes on email/password inputs - should add for better test automation
SMTP email sending is MOCKED - no actual emails are sent (as expected per requirements)
seed_data_creation: Seed data created via /api/seed endpoint - admin user and categories (Media Services, Feature Requests, Bug Reports) with subcategories
context_for_next_testing_agent: V2 Command Center fully functional. All 3 request types (Editing, Feature, Bug) work correctly. Categories management works. Profile page works. Quick links work. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / admin123. SMTP is MOCKED.
